title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
